note: V11 Phase 2 design refinement (C7.1) — eligibility rule simplified. The earlier two-clause exclusion (current block winner ALWAYS excluded + recent-winner cooldown) is replaced by a single rule: an address is excluded iff it won a block reward in the previous 5 blocks. The current block itself does NOT count for cooldown — a miner who finds the current block can still enter the lottery if that address did not win any of the previous 5 blocks. Rationale: the auto-exclusion of the current miner penalised winners after long silences; the simpler 'previous 5' rule is more permissive in benign cases and equivalent in the common case (miners who keep winning are naturally excluded by the cooldown). NO consensus behaviour change for any current chain height — Phase 2 stays gated by V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT = INT64_MAX. Phase 1 (block 7000) is unaffected. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
